text: What is one small thing that went well today?
Describe a moment today where you felt at peace.
What are you grateful for right now, in this exact moment?
What is one thing weighing on your mind? Can you set it aside for 10 minutes?
Write about something that made you smile recently.
What would you tell a friend who felt exactly the way you do right now?
Name three people who have positively impacted you this week.
What is one boundary you upheld today? How did that feel?
Describe the best version of your tomorrow.
What is something you've been putting off? What's one tiny step toward it?
Write about a place where you feel completely safe and at ease.
What does your body need most right now?
Celebrate something you did well this week, no matter how small.
What is your mood trying to tell you?
Write about something beautiful you noticed today.
If your current feeling were a weather pattern, what would it be?
What do you want to let go of before you sleep tonight?
What brought you joy today, even briefly?
Write a letter of encouragement to yourself from three years in the future.
What did you learn about yourself today?
